creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: xmj
Date: Mon Mar 30 15:48:37 UTC 2015
New revision: 382680
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/382680

Log:
  databases/puppetdb{,-terminus}: update to 2.2.2

  - Update puppetdb to 2.2.2
  - Update puppetdb-terminus to 2.2.2
  - Hardcode puppetdb_log_file, as it can be overwritten
    in rc.conf if necessary.

  PR:		198619
  Submitted by:	Michael Moll <kvedulv@kvedulv.de>
  Approved by:	mentors (implicit)

  head/databases/puppetdb/distinfo
  head/databases/puppetdb/files/puppetdb.in
  head/databases/puppetdb/pkg-plist
  head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/Makefile
  head/databases/puppetdb-terminus/distinfo
